message:
fix: prevent dolt-server zombie leaks from mail test suite (gt-qae2)

- Add testmain_test.go to internal/mail with CleanupDoltServer() call
- Add CONTRACT doc to RequireDoltServer requiring TestMain cleanup
- Reduce reap timeout from 1h to 10min for faster zombie cleanup

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,14 @@
+package mail
+
+import (
+	"os"
+	"testing"
+
+	"github.com/steveyegge/gastown/internal/testutil"
+)
+
+func TestMain(m *testing.M) {
+	code := m.Run()
+	testutil.CleanupDoltServer()
+	os.Exit(code)
+}
